mano_cua.result_summary: Google Fonts通过CSS link异步加载（media=print+onload技巧）而非task要求的script标签方式。字体不阻塞渲染、无白屏，但使用的是link标签而非script标签加载，与issue fix目标（use script to load fonts）不符。存在FOUT风险
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Google Fonts are loaded via async CSS link tags (media=print + onload technique) rather than script tags. The loading is non-blocking with no white screen, but the method is CSS link-based, not script-based as the fix PR title suggests it should be. FOUT risk exists due to async loading pattern.
